headline: Broadridge Adds Capital Markets President As Valuation Lags Analyst Targets
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (NYSE:BR) has appointed Frank Troise as President of Global Capital Markets. The move expands the company’s executive leadership and front office capabilities across global capital markets. Broadridge Financial Solutions, trading at around $187.51, sits at an interesting point for investors who watch execution and leadership decisions closely. The stock is up 5.5% over the past week but shows a 4.9% decline over the past 30 days and a 14.9% decline year to...

headline: Broadridge Advancing Pass-Through Voting Across the Asset Management Industry and Powering Individual Investor Voice
summary: Global Fintech leader Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR), today announced a significant enhancement to its ProxyVote® platform that advances Pass-Through Voting capabilities for the asset management industry. Through the new enhanced experience, investors who are eligible for Pass-Through Voting can review and select their preferred voting policy immediately after completing their proxy ballot on ProxyVote. Whether accessing materials via secure email link, mobile device, or desktop

content.title: Broadridge Advancing Pass-Through Voting Across the Asset Management Industry and Powering Individual Investor Voice
content.summary: Global Fintech leader Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR), today announced a significant enhancement to its ProxyVote® platform that advances Pass-Through Voting capabilities for the asset management industry. Through the new enhanced experience, investors who are eligible for Pass-Through Voting can review and select their preferred voting policy immediately after completing their proxy ballot on ProxyVote. Whether accessing materials via secure email link, mobile device, or desktop
